message:
🐛 Fix Mission Browser tab reset when navigating back from detail view (#1541)

Move MissionDetailView rendering above tab-specific content so it
displays regardless of active tab. Remove setActiveTab('recommended')
from installer and solution card onSelect handlers. Gate tab content

This preserves the active tab (Installers/Solutions) when clicking a
tile and returning via 'Back to listing'.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
